name: Detroit
description: Jamerson's tone is warm and full - just right for the Pultrick. A p-bass with flats and foam helps, as does a little Vintage Microtubes before.

name: Perfect Picking
description: Pultrick's sweet top end enhances pick playing nicely - never gets harsh or brittle. The trick fills in the low end for an all round great plectrum tone.

name: Dub System
description: Crazy how much low end you can add with Pultrick without it getting overbearing. Crank up the sound system and roll off your tone to feel the bass!
